name: Official WhatsApp API (imBee)
description: Official WhatsApp Business API for your AI agent — no Meta verification, no server setup. Pair via QR in 2 minutes using imBee's verified shared number (free), or upgrade to a dedicated branded number for enterprise use.
author: imBee Limited

routingBaseUrl.description: Routing server base URL, e.g. http://localhost:28080

apiKey.description: Bearer token returned by POST /api/v1/pair/request (store via OpenClaw secrets when available)

allowFrom.description: E.164 allowlist for inbound WhatsApp senders
